summary: Live section-scoped sequencer validation scenarios built on the Stage 1 trained baseline and practical validation artifact.

scenarios.name: live-clean-phase-tree-chorus-spiral-focus
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: Design a single Chorus 1 concept for SpiralTrees. Keep SpiralTrees as the lead read and use flowing spiral motion rather than a generic segmented fill. Do not rewrite the whole show.

scenarios.name: live-clean-phase-spinner-restrained-texture
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: In the Bridge, keep Star restrained and texture-led rather than broad fill motion. Use a softer twinkle or shimmer family instead of a large directional pass.
